1.text: Interlobular septal thickening in the upper lobes of both lungs and the lower lobe of the right lung

2.text: Ground-glass opacities in the upper lobes of both lungs and the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Linear density increases in the upper lobes of both lungs and the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Millimetric nodules in the upper lobes of both lungs and the lower lobe of the right lung
